posts.hook: Your Friday night Netflix binge is about to wreck your eyes. Do this first.
posts.caption:
Before you start your weekend binge, do this:

1. Palming (60 seconds) — warm your hands, cover closed eyes
2. Focus Shift (30 seconds) — alternate near and far focus
3. Set a 20-minute reminder for breaks

Your Monday-morning self will thank you.

Free at axeo.vision/exercise

#Axeo #AxeoVision #WeekendPrep #NetflixAndChill #EyeHealth #SelfCare #FridayRoutine

posts.hook: Week 1 of building Axeo in public. Here's what we shipped.
posts.caption:
Week 1 building Axeo in public.

What we shipped:
- 6 free browser-based eye exercises (HTML5 Canvas)
- Snellen acuity test + Ishihara color vision test
- Landing page at axeo.vision

What we learned:
- People don't know eye exercises exist
- The phrase 'vision training' confuses people (they think LASIK)
- Short-form video is the fastest way to demonstrate value

Next week: ARKit tracking demo, first paid conversions target.

If you're in health tech or building consumer wellness products, would love to connect.

axeo.vision
